title: Kanban View for other columns other than a Status column
excerpt: Please change the Kanban chart so you can group by other items other than Status. We have other non-columns that we need to report on that would be presented perfectly in the Kanban view

posts.author: huwrc (Huw)
posts.cookedHtml: Please change the Kanban chart so you can group by other items other than Status. We have other non-columns that we need to report on that would be presented perfectly in the Kanban view

posts.author: mviquez (Michael Viquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please do!!

A possible helpful work around is to create a secondary status column that you want to group by. But it does suck that there are no other options to group by.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @huwrc ,

You can try out our app Multi Board Kanban. You can group Kanban using

  • Status Columns

  • People Columns

  • Dropdown Columns

  • Group

You can use this for a single board as a Board view or for multiple boards as a Dashboard Widget. Additionally, you can also see sub items of a board as separate draggable cards.

Is this what you had in mind?
